findings.source_text: what the project is trying to achieve and what it is explicitly not trying to become
findings.localized_text: kaj projekt skuša doseči in česa ne sme postati
findings.preferred_localized_text: kaj projekt skuša doseči in kaj ne sme postati
findings.explanation: The original Slovenian preserves meaning but mirrors English contrast structure too closely. The preferred version restores cleaner native parallelism.
findings.review_guidance: Check whether contrast pairs preserve natural parallel structure instead of copying English asymmetry.
findings.prompt_guidance: Prefer native parallel structures over literal English contrast framing when the meaning remains the same.

findings.source_text: Why documentation cannot wait until later
findings.preferred_localized_text: Zakaj se z dokumentacijo ne sme čakati
findings.explanation: The literal Slovenian transfers agency to the abstract noun instead of preserving the implied human agent.
findings.review_guidance: Watch for English headings that hide the human actor inside an abstract noun.
findings.prompt_guidance: If English uses compressed abstract-noun phrasing, restore the implied actor when the target language needs it.

findings.source_text: Administrators must be able to disable OCR, translation, and condition assessment when needed. Paid enrichments must be explicitly enabled, traceable, and cost-controlled.
findings.localized_text: Skrbniki morajo moči OCR, prevajanje in ocenjevanje stanja po potrebi tudi izklopiti. Plačljive obogatitve morajo biti izrecne, sledljive in stroškovno nadzorovane.
findings.preferred_localized_text: Skrbniki morajo imeti možnost, da po potrebi izklopijo OCR, prevajanje in ocenjevanje stanja. Plačljive obogatitve morajo biti izrecno omogočene, sledljive in stroškovno nadzorovane.
findings.explanation: The draft preserves broad meaning but remains unpublishable because of ungrammatical modality, awkward word order, and domain-inappropriate policy phrasing.
findings.review_guidance: Review modal constructions and policy phrasing even when the broad meaning seems correct.
findings.prompt_guidance: Recheck literal translations of 'must be able to' and policy phrases about explicit enablement before signoff.
findings.terminology_guidance: In policy text, explicit enablement is not the same as describing something as explicit.

findings.source_text: Benchmark fixture direction / Structured review examples should also be stored as reusable benchmark fixtures
findings.localized_text: Primerjalna smer napeljave / Strukturirane primere pregledov je treba shraniti tudi kot primerjalne napeljave za večkratno uporabo
findings.preferred_localized_text: Referenčni primeri za primerjalno vrednotenje / Strukturirane primere pregledov je treba shraniti tudi kot ponovno uporabne referenčne primere za primerjalno vrednotenje
findings.explanation: The English technical term 'fixture' was resolved using the wrong physical-infrastructure sense instead of the testing and evaluation sense.
findings.review_guidance: Resolve testing and evaluation vocabulary by software QA domain meaning first.
findings.prompt_guidance: When translating benchmarking or evaluation text, treat 'fixture' as a reusable reference example or test artifact unless the physical domain is explicit.
findings.terminology_guidance: Do not use infrastructure or wiring meanings for 'fixture' in QA, benchmarking, or LLM evaluation contexts.

findings.source_text: The hidden exclusion of English-only systems
findings.preferred_localized_text: Why English-only systems exclude people / Zakaj sistemi, ki so na voljo samo v angleščini, izključujejo ljudi
findings.explanation: The original English heading compressed too much meaning into an English-specific nominal pattern. Native-speaker review showed that the better fix was to improve the English source wording rather than repeatedly compensating in each target language.
findings.review_guidance: If multiple locales struggle with the same compressed English source phrase, review the English source instead of forcing each locale to compensate independently.
findings.prompt_guidance: When the source relies on compressed nominal phrasing that becomes awkward across locales, recommend a clearer English rewrite before finalizing target-language fixes.

source_review_recommendation.reason: The defect originates in English source compression and becomes easier to prevent by rewriting the source once.
